content:
Your resume is well-organized and presents your experience effectively. The objective statement could be slightly more specific to the job you’re applying for. Additionally, the work experience section would benefit from more quantifiable achievements—try to include numbers or results that demonstrate your impact in previous roles. Consistency in formatting is also important, so double-check spacing and bullet points.

Overall, these are small refinements that will help elevate your application even more. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

Grades:
• Cover Letter: 82/100
• Resume: 86/100

⸻

Letter for Jonika Poitier

Dear Jonika,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. Your materials show a strong understanding of how to present yourself professionally. Below is my feedback.

Your cover letter is well-written and professional. You effectively outline your qualifications, but one area that could be improved is tailoring the letter more to the specific role and company. Right now, the letter provides a strong general overview, but adding more details about why you’re drawn to this company and how your skills align with their mission would strengthen it. Additionally, your closing paragraph could be refined to include a stronger call to action, such as requesting an interview.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 20 (chunk 20/22)
